name: Suyou
intro: Suyou, the Mask of the Immortal, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Transient Immortal
abilities.description: Buff Tap-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Mortal form, grant him 40 Movement Speed and decreasing the interval between Basic Attacks . Hold-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Immortal form, increasing the damage of Basic Attacks to 125% and granting him 20% Physical Damage Reduction. In this form, for every 20 extra Physical Attack Suyou has, he gains 1% Physical Damage Reduction (up to 40%).

abilities.name: Blade Surge
abilities.description: Mobility CC Tap: Suyou throws his weapon in the target direction, dealing 250–330 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in its path. Suyou then blinks to the weapon's location, catches it, and performs a slash in the opposite direction, dealing 375–495 (+150% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage . Hold: Suyou channels the Immortal's power and charges in the target direction, dealing 250–330 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies along the path. When hitting an enemy hero, he stops and stuns enemies in a rectangular area in front for 0.6 seconds. The charge increase distance increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.

abilities.name: Soul Sever
abilities.description: AOE Burst Tap: Suyou performs a sweeping attack with his weapon, dealing [300–492 (+200% Extra Physical Attack) (+target's 20% Lost HP) Physical Damage ] to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Hold: Suyou channels the Immortal's power to perform 3 cleaves in a fan-shaped area. The first two strikes deal 250–410 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage each, while the final strike deals 400–656 (+128% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage and recovers 150–230 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) HP for himself.

abilities.name: Evil Queller
abilities.description: Damage Debuff Tap: Suyou glides backward and swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing 420–580 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in a rectangular area and on his path back ward, and reducing their Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5 seconds. Hold: Suyou uses the Immortal's power to shoot a deadly arrow in the target direction, dealing 580–800 (+165% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target hit. The range increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.
